card.name: Sandcliff Falcon
card.text: Flying Battalion — Whenever this creature and at least two other creatures attack, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Ghostwyve Ascetic
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature attacks, you may tap an untapped creature you control or pay {2}{W}. When you do, tap target creature.

card.name: Frontier Commando
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Seek New Horizons
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Scout creature tokens. If you control a non-Scout token, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Ben Alkan Tracker
card.text: Flying {4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: East Post Sentry
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Battalion — Whenever this creature and at least two other creatures attack, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Airshaper Recluse
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Gritforged Outcast
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature token with flying.

card.name: Mithren's Eulogist
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature you control died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Exosphere Drifter
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Warm Cavalcade
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.

card.name: Edict of the Clans
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature. Edict of the Clans deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target creature.

card.name: Become the Cycle
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn. When it dies this turn, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Gravity Well
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target artifact or creature an opponent controls until this artifact leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Through the Aperture
card.text: Return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Nexus Trailblazer
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. Whenever an artifact you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Bubbling Medusa
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. You can't spend this mana to cast creature spells or activate abilities of creatures.

card.name: Disciple of Sand and Rime
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Exoticum Fanatics
card.text: Vigilance Concord — This creature gets +2/+1 as long as there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Chrome Rootwalla
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {1}{U}. If you do, draw a card, then discard a card. {1}{U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Onyx Scoutplane
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or battle, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Hetha's Emissary
card.text: Concord — When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand if that creature's mana value is 3 or less or if there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Colossus School
card.text: Flying Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Harvester's Jetpack
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has flying. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Reproach
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. You may pay {1}. If you do, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Scrive the Auldyears
card.text: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and exile the other face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Paratrooper Storm
card.text: Until end of turn, target artifact or creature becomes a 4/4 artifact creature with flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Reprogram
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature Enchanted creature is a 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature with flying. It loses all other types and abilities.

card.name: Ad Astra Per Aspera
card.text: Draw three cards. Concord — Discard a card unless there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Suck Into Space
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Intrepid Jumper
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token. Eclipse 4 — {4}{B} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 4/4 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Darkstar Voyager
card.text: Flying This creature can't block. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Hangar Security
card.text: Menace Eclipse 6 — {5}{B}{B} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 6/6 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Elegiac Drifter
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever this creature attacks, if you've discarded a card this turn, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Isbail's Acolyte
card.text: Lifelink {B}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Create a tapped Treasure token. {2}{B}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Outpost Medium
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards, then you may exile a creature card from your graveyard into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Elite Strike Operative
card.text: Flash As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may discard a card. When this creature enters, destroy target creature if that creature was dealt damage this turn or if you discarded a card as you cast this spell.

card.name: Dunebreach Wurm
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may exile a card from your graveyard. When you do, target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Startrawler Colony
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Blood Soliloquy
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or discard a card. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Pry
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if a card was put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn. Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose an artifact or creature card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Consult the Omens
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at them. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: Lost to Stars
card.text: Destroy target creature. Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Deadly Dispute
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Reverse Misfortune
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, create a tapped token that's a copy of it."

card.name: Vein Cracker
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: First Responder
card.text: Menace Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Armament Dealer
card.text: {T}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn. If it has power 4 or greater, it also gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Pyretic Assailant
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create a tapped Treasure token. {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Shale Excavator
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature token. Eclipse 2 — {4}{R} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 2/2 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Ben Lasair Dauntless
card.text: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, this creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Digger Technician
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. If you control an artifact, exile the top two cards of your library instead. Until the end of your next turn, you may play a card exiled this way.

card.name: Stalkleg Colony
card.text: Trample Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, up to one target creature can't block this creature this turn.

card.name: Hexclaw Ravager
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, choose one — • This creature deals 3 damage to any target. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Distant Thunder
card.text: Distant Thunder deals 2 damage to any target. Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Incendiary Rifle
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains first strike until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Form of Auld Beasts
card.text: Target creature you control gains trample until end of turn. It gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you've discarded a card this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Into Bloody Mist
card.text: Into Bloody Mist deals 4 damage to any nonplayer target. If that permanent would be put into a graveyard this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: The Starclan Arrives
card.text: Choose one — • Discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards plus one. • Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Inside Job
card.text: Inside Job deals 5 damage to target creature. If excess damage was dealt this way, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Duskbloom Nurturer
card.text: When this creature enters, mill two cards. {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Pulverizer Artillery
card.text: Deathtouch Concord — Whenever this creature attacks, if there are four or more card types among permanents you control, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Gemcap Cartographer
card.text: When this creature dies, create a Treasure token. Eclipse 3 — {3}{G} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 3/3 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Traversal Vehicle
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.

card.name: Ben Dorcha Cuirassier
card.text: Vigilance, reach Eclipse 6 — {5}{G}{G} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 6/6 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Ulbest Packleader
card.text: Trample Trample over battles (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the defender of the battle it's attacking.)

card.name: Territorial Quilldog
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks with another creature with power 4 or greater, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Arcane Guide
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 3/3 green Elk creature token with vigilance, then put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if you control a non-Elk token.

card.name: Mawbloom Grove
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Triumphant Ulbest
card.text: Trample Concord — When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. If there are four or more card types among permanents you control, you gain 5 life instead.

card.name: Scarwood Growth
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+3 and gains reach and hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Thunderous Clash
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If that creature dealt 4 or more damage this way, surveil 2.

card.name: Steel Into Dust
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or battle. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Botanical Survey
card.text: Create a tapped Everywhere token. (It's a land with every basic land type.)

card.name: Silaine's Echo
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1. Concord — Enchanted creature has trample as long as there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Starjoy Excursion
card.text: Create a 1/1 red Scout creature token. Whenever you create a non-Scout token, you may exile this card from your graveyard into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Dune Skimmer
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. {2}{W}: Create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Perimeter Stalwart
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Another target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. {2}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Vengeful Swordsculptor
card.text: First strike Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, it gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Willforger Technician
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, create a 2/1 blue Reflection creature token. Whenever you create a non-Reflection token, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature or on target Reflection you control.

card.name: Wyvekeeper Chaplain
card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to three creature cards with total mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. Whenever this creature attacks, you may put a card exiled with it into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Eradication Force
card.text: When this creature enters, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.") This creature gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control.

card.name: Slatecoat Company
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature enters or attacks, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token. Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, attacking creatures get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Herald of the Untold
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. • Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Confine to Myth
card.text: Destroy target creature, artifact, or battle. Its controller creates an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Casus Belli
card.text: When a player casts their second spell each turn, sacrifice this enchantment. If you do, each of that player's opponents draws two cards.

card.name: Quicksilver Recon
card.text: Flash Flying {3}{U}, Sacrifice this creature: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Activate only as a sorcery unless this creature entered this turn.

card.name: Auldscar Lookout
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, look at the top six cards of your library. Reveal up to one instant or sorcery card from among them, exile it into your augury, then shuffle. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Studied Shredder
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or battle, if it isn't a token, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Relic Inquisitor
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1. Concord — At the beginning of your end step, if there are four or more card types among permanents you control, create a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Tetherstone Keeper
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Artifacts and creatures you control have "{2}: This becomes a copy of target tapped creature an opponent controls. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Shimmering Glider
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may draw a card for each artifact you control. If you drew one or more cards this way, discard two cards.

card.name: Scar Lagoon Ravager
card.text: Flash This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard. When this creature enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Divine Compulsion
card.text: Counter target artifact or creature spell. Its controller may surveil 2.

card.name: Nanomesh Gauntlet
Adaptive Facsimile
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, surveil 1 and put a +1/+1 counter on this artifact. {2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Over Alien Hills
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Basalt Peacekeeper
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Each opponent who can't loses 4 life. Eclipse 4 — {4}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard as a 4/4 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Reulguided Isolate
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or battle, you lose that much life unless you discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Strike Commander
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another artifact or creature. If you do, draw a card. {3}{B}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Reliquary Drifter
card.text: As long as you've cast two or more spells this turn, this creature has deathtouch and lifelink. Eclipse 3 — {2}{B}, Pay 3 life. (You may cast this from your graveyard as a 3/3 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Priest of Twinning Fate
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library and up to one target creature card from your graveyard into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Grim Portent
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. When this creature dies, create a 0/1 black Cleric creature token with "Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life."

card.name: Thoughtwinder
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may exile a nonland card from you graveyard. Then if a card left your graveyard this turn, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Cull the Legion
card.text: Choose one or both — • Remove up to five counters from target permanent. • All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Startrawler Extermination
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, each opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Screaming Silence
card.text: Until end of turn, abilities don't trigger. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Decrypt
card.text: Look at target opponent's hand and choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card, then exiles the top card of their library face down into their augury. (They may look at it. As a sorcery, they may pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from their augury into their hand.)

card.name: Impact Scavengers
card.text: First strike Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Lucus, Brigadier General
card.text: During your turn, Lucus has first strike. Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Silverbone Trudger
card.text: Ward—Pay X life, where X is the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Marbhwood Phoenix
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, if it was cast, it deals damage equal to its power to any target. Eclipse X — {X}{X}{R} (Cast this from your graveyard as an X/X for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Emboldened Reserves
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {2}{R} and discard a card. If you do, copy it. (The copy becomes a token.) Menace

card.name: Fuschia Tetrapod
card.text: When this creature enters, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) Whenever you discard a card, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Far Reach Marksman
card.text: Reach Whenever an artifact you control enters, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn. As long as you control three or more artifacts, this creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: Devoted Legion
card.text: Trample, haste Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, you may discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Manifold Blade
Gondwel's Vision
card.text: Gondwel's Vision deals 2 damage to each creature. Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Fractures in the Belt
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, it deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets.

card.name: Stranded Pathfinder
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for up to two basic land cards, exile them into your augury, then shuffle. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) {4}{G}{G}: This creature (indefinitely) becomes a 0/0 Treefolk with trample and "This creature gets +1/+1 for each land you control."

card.name: Pack Tender
card.text: Whenever you create one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move a counter from this creature onto target creature token you conrol.

card.name: Longpillar Runners
card.text: Concord — Whenever this creature attacks, if there are four or more card types among permanents you control, draw a card.

card.name: Tenacious Twinjaw
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Then if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card. Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample.

card.name: Deepscar Experiment
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Eclipse 8 — {6}{G}{G} (Cast this from your graveyard as an 8/8 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Agile Surveyor
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target creature an opponent controls with flying.

card.name: Bane of Ben Dorcha
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/2 green Spider creature token with reach. If you control a non-Spider token, create two of those tokens instead. You may have those tokens enter tapped and attacking.

card.name: Insensate Dunedrifter
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among permanents you control. Trample, vigilance

card.name: Evolving Experiment
card.text: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, choose one — • Put a trample counter on it. • Double the number of +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Illicit Synthesis
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, enchanted creature fights up to one target creature an opponent controls. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) Enchanted creature gets +X/+X, where X is its base power.

card.name: One Small Step
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, reveal the top five cards of your library. Put a creature card from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Fion, Starborn Imperator
card.text: Flying Whenever Fion or another creature you control deals combat damage to a player or battle, you gain that much life. Whenever you attack, if you have at least 5 life more than your starting life total, put a +1/+1 counter on Fion and draw a card.

card.name: Ceann Aernoch
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Aernoch attacks, draw a card if you control more creatures than each opponent. If you don't, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token.

card.name: Mithren, Star Afire
card.text: Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever Mithren or another creature you control dies, return up to one target creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to your hand. (A token copy of a creature has that creature's mana value.)

card.name: Skybreak Assault
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Goldfield Aegis
card.text: Flying Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, each other attacking creature gains hexproof until your next turn.

card.name: Lost to Eternity
card.text: Exile all creatures.

card.name: Over Ben Alkan
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Reulfire Animist
card.text: Prowess At the beginning of your upkeep, up to one target noncreature, nonland permanent becomes a 1/1 Illusion creature in addition to its other types until end of turn. It gains prowess until end of turn.

card.name: Glyphbound Retributionist
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, up to one target nonland permanent's owner exiles it into their augury. (As a sorcery, they may pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from their augury into their hand.)

card.name: Hetha, Starshaper
card.text: When this creature enters, for each nonland permanent type, each player chooses a permanent they control of that type. Return all other nonland permanents not chosen this way to their owner's hands. Concord — As long as there are four or more card types among permanents you control, you may cast spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Into the Nexus
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, when you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Anomalous Archive
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a glyph counter on this artifact, then you may cast a spell with mana value equal to the number of glyph counters on this artifact from your hand without paying its mana cost. {2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at end of combat. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Devote
card.text: Enchant creature You control enchanted creature. Enchanted creature can't block or attack players.

card.name: Fleeting Memories
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, target player mills two cards. Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast if they target a player or permanent controlled by a player who has fewer cards in their library than half the minimum deck size.

card.name: Sandshaker Deathless
card.text: This creature has menace as long as you have one or fewer cards in hand. When this creature dies, you may exile it from your graveyard into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Visage of Isbail
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value X or less from among them, where X is the number of creatures that died under your control this turn. Put it onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Moira, the Risen Beyond
card.text: As long as Moira is on the battlefield, she has all activated abilities of creature cards in your graveyard. Eclipse 4 — Sacrifice three creatures. (You may cast this from your graveyard as a 4/4 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Fabric of Being
card.text: {B}, Pay 2 life: Draw a card. Activate only if you have no cards in hand.

card.name: Tormented Archmage
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may discard a card. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Arcane Tutor
card.text: Search your library for a card, exile it face down into your augury, then shuffle. You lose 3 life. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Into the Dark and Infinite
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Each player who can't discards a card. Each player who can't loses 7 life.

card.name: Caldera Scalder
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player can't gain life until your next turn. {2}{R}: Create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Avatars of Order
card.text: First strike Whenever a player casts a spell with a noncreature type or plays a nonbasic land, this creature deals 1 damage to them.

card.name: Quasar Paragon
card.text: Flying, haste Once each turn, when another creature you control enters, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw cards equal to its power.

card.name: Study the Nova
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Bloodkissed Auspex
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) Whenever you discard a card during your turn, this creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Interlinked Extractor
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, put a charge counter on this artifact. It deals 1 damage to target player. Remove X charge counters from this artifact: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to an opponent or permanent an opponent controls this turn, it deals that much damage plus X instead.

card.name: Prophetic Wish
card.text: Exile a card you own from outside the game into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Skitterblossom
card.text: Haste Creatures you control with power 3 or greater can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Scarwood Sentinel
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. Concord — This creature can't attack or block unless there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Restless Carapace
card.text: You may have creatures you control with counters on them assign their combat damage as though they weren't blocked. Eclipse 6 — {4}{G}{G} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 6/6 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Flee the Sandserpent
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, you may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Silaine's Retaliation
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 5/5 green Wurm creature token. • Destroy all artifacts.

card.name: A-17, Experiment Awry
card.text: Trample When A-17 enters, create Squish, a legendary 1/1 green Ooze creature token with trample. A-17 and other Oozes you control get +1/+1 for each non-Ooze token you control.

card.name: Ulbest Procession
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. Whenever a creature you control deals 4 or more combat damage to a player, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Auldyears Reliquary
card.text: When this artifact enters, put three soul counters on it and create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Whenever a creature you control dies, remove a soul counter from this artifact. Then if it has no soul counters on it, exile it and create two 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature tokens.

card.name: Audlom, Seer of Legions
card.text: First strike When Audlom enters, conjure three cards named Serra Angel into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Fate Rewritten
card.text: Exile the top seven cards of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at them. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draw seven cards. Exile Fate Rewritten.

card.name: Gondwel, Seer of Skies
card.text: Vigilance When Gondwel enters, conjure three cards named Brainstorm into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, draw two cards.

card.name: Isbail, Inexorable
card.text: Menace Whenever Isbail enters or attacks, sacrifice any number of other creatures you control. Return up to that many non-God creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Maelweth, Seer of Anguish
card.text: Flying When Maelweth enters, conjure three cards named Animate Dead into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) At the beginning of your upkeep, mill three cards.

card.name: Starclan Omniblade
card.text: Trample Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, double its power until end of turn. Do the same if it's attacking with four or more and eight or more other creatures.

card.name: Agnon, Seer of Flame
card.text: Menace When Agnon enters, conjure three cards named Faithless Looting into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) At the beginning of your end step, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Beyond Imagining
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Reveal the top seven cards of your library. Put any number of nonland permanent cards with total mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Silaine, Seer of Bloom
card.text: Trample When Silaine enters, conjure three cards named Explore into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) You may play lands from your graveyard.

card.name: Boltbright Infiltrator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.") Once each turn, you may pay {0} to activate an ability of an artifact token you control.

card.name: Glow Seeker
card.text: Prowess, lifelink Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: End of Sanity
card.text: Menace As long as you've discarded a card this turn, creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Pinnacle Aspect
card.text: Trample This creature and other creatures you control with power 4 or greater can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: Ulbest Keeper
card.text: Vigilance {4}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each different name among tokens you control.

card.name: Imperious Magistrate
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Crystal Ripper
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control enters, this creature gets +2/+0 and gains your choice of haste or trample until end of turn. Whenever this creature attacks, surveil 1.

card.name: Rise from Rot
card.text: Mill three cards. You may return a permanent card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Warbred Legionnaire
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of your library. Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, you may play a card exiled with it this turn.

card.name: Unnatural Encounter
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Concord — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if there are four or more card types among permanents you control, this enchantment becomes a 3/3 enchantment creature until end of turn.

card.name: Zeria, Syzygy Fanatic
card.text: When Zeria enters, create an Effigy token. (It's an artifact with "{2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, you may have it become a 4/4 until end of turn.

card.name: Goraidh, Shaped Arcanum
card.text: Menace Whenever Goraidh attacks, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard. If you've cast a spell this turn, you may put it into your hand. If you've cast two or more spells this turn, you may cast it by paying life equal to its mana value rather than paying its mana cost.

card.name: Murill, Brushed by Madness
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature dies, exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.) {2}{R}, Discard your hand: Put all cards from your augury into your hand.

card.name: Beastback Pillagers
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice that token.

card.name: Tarthan, Curio Collector
card.text: If you would create one or more creature tokens, you may instead choose one of the following creature tokens that hasn't been chosen this turn, then create that many of those tokens. • 1/1 white Spirit with flying. • 1/2 green Spider with reach. • 2/2 colorless Robot artifact.

card.name: Twingod Glorious
card.text: Flash Flying, lifelink When this creature enters, whenever a creature you control dies this turn, each opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Seeker of Forgotten Love
card.text: Artifacts you control are Clues, Food, Treasures, and Effigies in addition to their other types. (They have all abilities of each of those tokens.) Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Bone Chandelier
card.text: {1}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value and put it onto the battlefield. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Ceann Albus
card.text: Haste Battalion — Whenever this creature attacks with two or more other creatures, if this is the first combat phase of the turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there's an additional combat phase.

card.name: Splendor of Creation
card.text: The first creature spell you cast each turn has storm. (When you cast it, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.)

card.name: Abandoned Drifter
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, exile it into your augury, then shuffle. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Reparation Module
card.text: Vigilance, reach {2}, {T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Hangar Refurbisher
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card or put a card from your augury into your hand. {1}: This creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Isbail's Handblade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.) {7}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Deepscar Relic
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, surveil 1. {2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ancient Tetherstone
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: Deep Shale Totem
card.text: Cards can't leave graveyards. {2}: This becomes a 3/2 copy of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Standard-Issue Augmentation
Cacophonous Iteration
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each card named Cacophonous Iteration you own in exile or in your graveyard. Eclipse 3 — {6} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 3/3 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.) A deck can have any number of cards named Cacophonous Iteration.

card.name: Canopy Lander
card.text: Flying Whenever this Vehicle enters or attacks, create a tapped Everywhere token. (It's a land with every basic land type.) Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Distant Peaks
card.text: {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {W}{U}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Starkissed Parapet
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {U}{B}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Fallen Orbiter
card.text: {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {B}{R}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Rusted Aperture
card.text: {T}: Add {R} or {G}. {R}{G}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Cliffside Commune
card.text: {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {G}{W}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Seachrome Coast
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Darkslick Shores
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Blackcleave Cliffs
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Copperline Gorge
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Razorverge Thicket
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Concealed Courtyard
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Spirebluff Canal
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Blooming Marsh
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Etra, Farsky Paragon
card.text: Tap an untapped artifact you control: Put a loyalty counter on Etra. Activate only as a sorcery. [0]: Until end of turn, Etra becomes a Soldier creature with power and toughness equal to the number of loyalty counters on her and indestructible. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to her this turn. [-2]: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards and create two tapped Treasure tokens.

card.name: Subspace Bubble
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. Your life total becomes 1.

card.name: Exultance, Stellar Dreadnought
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) Flying Whenever Exultance attacks, it deals 4 damage to target creature an opponent controls. Crew 4

card.name: Etra's Elevator
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create an X/X colorless Robot artifact creature token, where X is the number of consecutive mana values among permanents you control starting from 1.

card.name: Eimhir, Arcanum Locus
card.text: Permanent spells you control can't be countered. Concord — Whenever you tap a permanent for mana, add an additional one mana of any color if there are four or more card types among permanents you control.

card.name: Evolving Wilds
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Dramatic Impact
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Aernoch's Triumph
card.text: Choose two from among flying, first strike, hexproof, and indestructible, then put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains the chosen abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Onward and Upward
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, create three 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Caitrin, Gleaming Beacon
card.text: Caitrin can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you may cast a spell with mana value less than or equal to that number of creatures from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Pluck
card.text: Counter up to one target spell. Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Freight Sabotage
card.text: Concord — When you cast this spell, if there are four or more card types among permanents you control, you may pay {1}{U}. If you do, copy this spell. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Enduring the Searise
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, return up to two target creatures to their owner's hands.

card.name: Thoughtless Culling
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If that creature was a token, its controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Probe the Nucleus
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Clandestine Engineering
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Hijack
card.text: Choose one — • Discard your hand, then draw three cards. • Gain control of target creature an opponent controls until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Outpost Hangar
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0. {3}{R}, {T}, Discard a card: Create a 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature token. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Flee the Arcology
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, destroy up to one target artifact or land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Raze the Scar
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Soil Sample
card.text: Search your library for up to three basic land cards. Put two of them onto the battlefield tapped and exile the other one into your augury. (As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Chart the Blossoms
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. Whenever you attack, create a 1/1 red Scout creature token tapped and attacking this. Sacrifice that token at end of combat.) When this Expedition enters or is defeated, return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Speaker of Eimhir
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal two permanent cards of different types from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Divine Incursion
card.text: Draw two cards, then discard a card unless you pay 3 life.

card.name: Bone Macerator
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card and pay {R}. When you do, this creature deals 2 damage to any target. Whenever you discard a card, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Territorial Coarseclaw
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. When you spend this mana to cast a creature spell, that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Photovolt Technicians
card.text: If you would create one or more non-Scout tokens, instead create those tokens plus a 1/1 red Scout creature token. Creature tokens you control have vigilance.

card.name: High Ambassador
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Surveil 1. This creature gets +1/+1 as long as a creature card was put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn.

card.name: Tachyonic Shuttle
card.text: Flying As long as you control two or more other artifacts, this Vehicle is an artifact creature. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Uncovered Amalgam
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, if it entered from a graveyard or was cast from a graveyard, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Eclipse 5 — {4}{B}{G} (Cast this from your graveyard as a 5/5 for its eclipse cost. It enters with a finality counter.)

card.name: Mass Deployment
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Scout creature tokens. Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ionosphere Test Site
card.text: {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {W}{B}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Rockbroken Citadel
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {U}{R}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Flatrock Fen
card.text: {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {B}{G}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Deep Belt Outpost
card.text: {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {R}{W}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Parachute Pools
card.text: {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {G}{U}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library face down into your augury. (You may look at it. As a sorcery, pay {1} and discard a card to put a card from your augury into your hand.)

card.name: Inspiring Vantage
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Botanical Sanctum
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control two or fewer other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.
